info.name: Stables-HT-HOL-time-daily-1-fix1
info.description:
HOLDER PERSPECTIVE: Hybrid Treasury Multi-Contract Behavioral Simulation

4 BEHAVIORAL MODELS x 31 DAILY EPOCHS = 124 PP EVENTS on liability contract

MODELS (all existing in risksrv3, zero code changes):
  RedemptionPressureModel (6.2)   — 609-event calibrated: peg deviation → daily redemption rate
  EarlyWarningModel (6.7)         — 4 signals with 2-8 hour lead time (F1: 0.63-0.80)
  BackingRatioModel (6.1)         — is the issuer solvent? Can they honor my redemption?
  MaturityLadderModel (6.3)       — when does next T-bill mature? Is cash coming?

8 REFERENCE INDEXES feed the 4 models at every daily epoch.

6 PAM CONTRACTS (same portfolio as ISS, viewed from holder side):
  Cash Reserve:    $5,000   (immediate liquidity available to holder)
  T-Bill 4-Week:   $25,000  (matures Mar 15 → cash spike)
  T-Bill 8-Week:   $25,000  (matures Mar 30 → cash spike)
  T-Bill 13-Week:  $25,000  (matures Apr 15)
  T-Bill 26-Week:  $23,000  (matures Jun 15)
  Liability:       $100,000 (stablecoin supply, all 4 models attached)

HOLDER DECISION FRAMEWORK:
  Day 1-7:   All quiet. Safe to park funds.
  Day 8-14:  EW signals escalate. RedemptionPressure rises. Consider exit.
  Day 15:    T-bill maturity calms market. Cash recovers. Hold.
  Day 30:    Second maturity. Portfolio rebalanced.

RESEARCH BASIS:
  609 de-peg events: redemption rate calibration (Lyons & Viswanath-Natraj 2023)
  EW signal validation: F1 scores 0.63-0.80 from same dataset
  SVB/USDC March 2023: 103% backed but $3.3B frozen

CONFIRMED: Zero code changes. Collection JSON only. All endpoints pre-exist.

Open Postman Console (Ctrl+Alt+C) before running.

exec: console.log('✅ HOL_RESERVES_01: Public reserve data visible to holder');
console.log('✅ HOL_CASH_01: Cash available for redemptions');
console.log('✅ HOL_PEG_RISK_01: Composite risk for MaturityLadder');
console.log('   4 signals: curve>15%, orderbook>40%, CEX>3x, sentiment<-2z');
console.log('   Holder view: is the issuer solvent? Can they pay me?');
console.log('   Holder view: when does next T-bill mature? Is cash coming?');

console.log('  Models: RedemptionPressure + EarlyWarning + BackingRatio + MaturityLadder');
if(pps.length>10) console.log('    ... and '+(pps.length-10)+' more PP events');
